Carter finds Dejah Thoris. Though she recognizes him and loves him, she explains that Barsoomian custom makes her vow to Sab Than binding. She informs him that he cannot marry her while Sab lives, nor can he wed a man who kills her husband.
john_carter enters with high urgency, physically marked by combat.
A heavy, static silence of resignation between the two characters.
The confrontation shifts from a desperate reunion to a realization of legal impossibility.
